overview.value: Jade Plant is a woody succulent with thick oval leaves. It grows slowly, lives for many years, and prefers bright light with dry soil cycles.

localizedContentsJSON.value: {"en":{"commonName":"Jade Plant","overview":"Jade Plant is a woody succulent with thick oval leaves. It grows slowly, lives for many years, and prefers bright light with dry soil cycles.","tips":"Prune lightly to keep a compact tree-like shape."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"玉树","overview":"玉树是木质化多肉植物，叶片厚实椭圆。它生长较慢、寿命很长，喜欢明亮光线和干湿分明的浇水节奏。","tips":"轻度修剪能帮助它维持紧凑的小树形态。"}}
